{"code": "def fibonacci_sequence(n):
    """Calculates the first n numbers of the Fibonacci sequence."""
    if n <= 0:
        return []
    if n == 1:
        return [0]
    
    sequence = [0, 1]
    while len(sequence) < n:
        next_fib = sequence[-1] + sequence[-2]
        sequence.append(next_fib)
    return sequence

# Calculate the first 30 Fibonacci numbers
n = 30
fib_list = fibonacci_sequence(n)

# Print the result as a list
print(fib_list)"}
